# SSE event types

Events streamed over `GET /api/runs/{id}/events`:

- `agent_completed`
- `agent_delta`
- `agent_reasoning`
- `agent_turn_started`
- `awaiting_user_input`
- `error`
- `final_result`
- `history_compressed`
- `hypothesis_update`
- `moderator_decision`
- `reasoning_effort_ignored`
- `run_cancelled`
- `run_finished`
- `run_resumed`
- `run_started`
- `tool_approval_request`
- `tool_approval_resolved`
- `tool_call`
- `tool_call_started`
- `user_comment`
